title: garnotia linearis
intro: Garnotia linearis is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Garnotia linearis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Garnotia linearis often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
